## Checklist

- [ ] If this adds a new skill, it lives under `skills/<skill-name>/` with a `SKILL.md` and a `README.md`.
- [ ] If this edits an existing skill's instructions, I tried it with Claude first to confirm the change is needed and works as expected.
- [ ] If this adds or changes a skill's `README.md`, it follows the section order in [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md#skill-readme-style-guide).
- [ ] `Sample output` (if included) is a real transcript, not an invented one.
